data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether Sila Realty Trust Inc. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Ademi LLP in Milwaukee as of April 20, 2026, regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations by Sila (NYSE: BLD) in connection with its recent agreement with Blue Owl Capital. For more information on participating in the investigation and accessing further details, click on the provided link.

data.title: Verismo Therapeutics' Initial Clinical Data from STAR-101 Phase 1 Trial of SynKIR™-110 KIR-CAR Presented at AACR 2026 Plenary Session
data.description: Initial clinical findings reveal promising safety records and varying effectiveness levels based on dosage in cohorts 1 to 3 for advanced solid tumors with a novel multi-chain KIR-CAR cell therapy. Early data indicates significant biological impact on tumor targets, with a focus on dose-dependent efficacy signals in the initial testing phases.
Ukraine sees high chance of Druzhba flows resuming Tuesday.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Jeffrey E. Geier, CEO as an Inner Circle Lifetime
data.description: In Colfax, Washington, on April 20, 2026, Jeffrey E. Geier has been honored by The Inner Circle with a prestigious title of Inner Circle Lifetime member. Geier, who has served as a CEO in the banking and healthcare sectors for over 30 years, has been acknowledged for his expertise in assisting executives in managing the undisclosed expenses that come with achieving success.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Russell E. Jones as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona on April 20, 2026, Russell E. Jones has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his advancements in Software Engineering and Communications. Jones has showcased pioneering innovation in these fields and has amassed a significant number of accolades.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Flex Co./
data.description: A recent announcement from The Flex Company reveals their expansion of access to their menstrual disc innovation through the introduction of a new 6-pack option and the launch of a "Beginners Welcome" campaign. The update includes a new logo. This information was shared on 20-Apr-2026 by The Flex Co. via PR Newswire.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Clinton Jones as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Stillwater, Oklahoma, Clinton Jones was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence for his valuable contributions to the American Academy of Microbiology. Clinton Jimmie Jones, PhD, currently holds the prestigious Sitlington Professor position and has been acknowledged for his outstanding work in the field.

data.title: Gastops Launches FluidSIGHT™ Real-Time Oil Condition Monitoring System
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Gastops unveiled FluidSIGHT™, an innovative real-time oil condition monitoring system. This system offers ongoing analysis of engine health in marine and industrial settings. Gastops is recognized worldwide for its advanced condition monitoring solutions.

data.title: Kia and TotalEnergies Celebrate 15 Years of Global Collaboration with a Fourth Contract Renewal
data.description: The global partnership between Kia Corporation and TotalEnergies Lubrifiants has been extended for another 5 years starting from April 1st, 2026. This renewal follows a 15-year cooperation focused on providing top-tier lubricants.

data.title: Large Ethereum investor makes $90M long bets as price targets $3.2K, driven by $2.4K surge, potential rally to $3K.
data.description: The recent increase in ETH value to $2,400 has prompted significant investors, known as whales, to initiate large-scale long bets on ETH. This surge is supported by technical analysis indicating a potential short-term price rally for ETH to reach $3,000.

data.title: The Onion acquires Infowars in deal pending Texas judge's approval, granting access to website.
data.description: A Texas judge is needed to authorize a new agreement that would grant The Onion permission to utilize the Infowars brand and website URL.

data.title: New system refunds $166B tariffs after SC ruling; Importers to get repayments 2 months post-ruling.
data.description: After the Supreme Court revoked tariffs central to the president's trade policy, the government introduced a new system for reimbursing importers. This repayment scheme is set to take effect two months following the court's decision.

data.title: ModMed Acquires Bonsai Health to Accelerate AI-Powered Patient Engagement
data.description: Boca Raton, Florida - ModMed®, a prominent software and services provider catering to specialty medical practices and supported by Clearlake Capital Group, L.P., disclosed the procurement of Bonsai Health, a flourishing AI patient engagement platform. This deal signifies a significant advancement in ModMed's initiative to establish the AI-Powered Practice, incorporating advanced front-office automation functionalities including automated patient reactivation and AI-based self-scheduling. This strategic move underlines ModMed's commitment to innovation in enhancing medical practice operations.

data.title: ISPE Announces 2026 Facility of the Year Awards (FOYA) Category Winners
data.description: At the 2026 ISPE Europe Annual Conference held in Copenhagen, Denmark, the FOYA Judges declared eight category winners and two honorable mentions. The International Society of Pharmaceutical Engineering (ISPE) revealed the recipients at the event. The winners were recognized in various categories for their outstanding contributions to the field. The prestigious awards highlighted the achievements of individuals and companies making remarkable advancements in pharmaceutical engineering. This recognition underscores the importance of innovation and excellence in the industry.

data.title: New Brattle Report Finds SEC Enforcement Activity Remains Subdued in H1 FY26
data.description: In San Francisco on April 20, 2026, a recent report by Brattle Senior Associate Adrienna Huffman and Principal Jan Jindra revealed that the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) initiated only 92 enforcement actions in the initial six months of fiscal year 2026 (H1 FY26). This number marks a noticeable decline in enforcement actions compared to previous periods, signaling a significant drop in regulatory activity by the SEC in that timeframe.

data.title: What's Going On With Microsoft Stock Monday?
data.description: Microsoft Corporation's (NASDAQ: MSFT) shares experienced a volatile range during trading on Monday, with a lack of data shifting focus towards technical levels and positioning. Analysts observed a quieter session with potential sudden turns at key pivots. The stock is on a downward trend and currently trading below the weekly 20-week and 50-week moving averages, though still above the 200-week line. This alignment could lead to gradual pullbacks and rapid rebounds. The $400 mark is critical as traders monitor Microsoft's movements. In light of minimal data, price action may adhere closely to technical indicators but could also swiftly reverse during low participation. The analysis pinpointed a pivotal point near $419.75, with potential downside targets at $414.75 and $409.75 if selling pressure increases. Furthermore, $380 is considered a substantial longer-term support tied to the 200-week average zone. The article provides further insights on Benzinga.com.
